title: Anil rugosa
taxonomy: Anil rugosa, also known as Anisomeles rugosa, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. It is native to the tropical forests of Asia. The plant is classified as a shrub or a small tree, with leaves that are opposite and entire. Anisomeles rugosa is often used in traditional medicine, particularly in Southeast Asian cultures. It is also valued for its ornamental value due to its clusters of small, white flowers.
